## Proposed behavior

Describe the behavior or command.

## Could it modify anything?

- [ ] No, read-only only
- [ ] It might write reports only
- [ ] It might modify files
- [ ] It might modify Rekordbox XML
- [ ] It might modify a Rekordbox database

## Required guardrails

List dry-run, backup, manifest, approval, and verification requirements.
